column.text:
• Boston Red Sox transferred LF Roman Anthony to the 60-day injured list with a partially torn finger ligament.
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list due to back spasms.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• Los Angeles Angels designated veteran first baseman Trey Mancini for assignment.
• Baltimore Orioles activated star catcher Adley Rutschman from the 7-day injured list.
• Texas Rangers placed LF Wyatt Langford on the 10-day IL and activated CF Evan Carter from the injured list.
• Chicago Cubs designated veteran right-hander Vince Velasquez for assignment.
• Detroit Tigers activated RHP Jack Flaherty from the 15-day injured list.
• Baltimore Orioles designated catcher Sam Huff for assignment after activating Adley Rutschman.
• Minnesota Twins sent starting pitcher Bailey Ober on a rehab assignment to Single-A Cedar Rapids.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
